name_cn:
【Original Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive 🔥 Brown/Antique Gold
▪ROSE▪️ New Fall/Winter Style, Korean Celebrity Hobo!! The trendy shoulder bag Y finally has it!! The bag has a simple, structured silhouette, looking structured but not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish 👍
Model: 713938【Original Leather】
Size: 23x22x8cm
